testsuite.name: Network Layer Integration

testcase.name: should aggregate health status from all components
should discover and transfer blob between two nodes
should track peer events across unified network

testsuite.system-out: 20:46:12.561 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: mB7GaknRB+o+UQA0t/ZA2A==, expected response: yIs5b7yA5ayixEaQxREZT9KmqQg= 20:46:12.587 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.maxCapacityPerThread: 4096 20:46:12.588 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.ratio: 8 20:46:12.588 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.chunkSize: 32 20:46:12.588 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.blocking: false 20:46:12.588 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.batchFastThreadLocalOnly: true 20:46:12.690 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0xc74bdc00, L:/127.0.0.1:51538 - R:/127.0.0.1:51540] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 20:46:12.691 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: mB7GaknRB+o+UQA0t/ZA2A==, response: yIs5b7yA5ayixEaQxREZT9KmqQg= Connecting to: ws://127.0.0.1:60510 20:46:24.455 [nioEventLoopGroup-51-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: OMYcY6nyF/cBpgxsevt8Tw==, expected response: 6F5VJ9lgjb+886Qe9EjcoB6mi8Q= 20:46:24.463 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0xc4b6bb85, L:/127.0.0.1:60510 - R:/127.0.0.1:60512] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 20:46:24.463 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: OMYcY6nyF/cBpgxsevt8Tw==, response: 6F5VJ9lgjb+886Qe9EjcoB6mi8Q= Connection successful
